Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates that the patient has a diagnosis of "Pure hypercholesterolemia." This is a clear and explicit evidence of a lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this diagnosis is already present, it is highly likely that it will be coded again in the patient's next hospital visit. The presence of this specific diagnosis suggests ongoing management or monitoring of the lipid disorder, further supporting the prediction that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed again.
